meaning: n.克朗(丹麦,挪威之货币单位),德国旧金币
examples: Norwegian Krone (currency code NOK) is the name of the currency used in Norway.
Danes fear that without the krone they might have sunk into an Irish quagmire.
We have long argued that the Norwegian krone is a better safe haven play than the Swiss franc.
Go long the British pound, the Norwegian krone or the Swedish krona, while shorting the euro.
Denmark's krone, which is pegged to the euro, was stable as well, helped by swift central bank action.
